assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Sentry project, instrument an Express app, and capture a first error event.

first_success.outcome: An exception from the instrumented Express application is sent to Sentry and becomes an issue.
first_success.observable_signal: The Sentry Issues page displays the triggered error with its stack trace.

route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.

candidates.name: Express error monitoring for Node.js
candidates.reason: The official Express guide demonstrates actual error capture with the supported Node SDK; the getting-started route does not document a standalone ingest cURL shortcut.

candidates.name: Manual envelope ingestion with cURL
candidates.reason: It is a protocol reference, not the documented Express onboarding route, and bypasses supported SDK instrumentation.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Sentry and create a JavaScript Express project.
required_path.observable_result: The project setup page displays its DSN.

required_path.action: Install the Sentry Node SDK in the Express application.
Initialize Sentry before other application imports using the project DSN.
required_path.observable_result: The app starts with Sentry instrumentation.

required_path.action: Add or use a route that throws an error, then run the Express app and request that route.
required_path.observable_result: The SDK captures and sends the exception.

required_path.action: Open Sentry Issues and locate the error.
required_path.observable_result: The new issue and stack trace are visible.

prerequisites.description: A Sentry account and JavaScript project.
An Express Node.js application and npm.

external_gates.description: This supported route requires adding the Sentry Node SDK to the Express app.
The SDK requires the project's DSN.

platform_outcomes.description: An exception from the instrumented Express application is sent to Sentry and becomes an issue.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: Framework version can change the exact initialization and error-handler placement shown by the wizard.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
